name: Otter AI
one_liner: Otter.ai is an AI-powered meeting assistant platform that provides transcription, recording, and meeting intelligence services.
mcp_notes: An official MCP server exists to connect Otter meeting data to AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and Cursor. It is distinct from the public REST API.
access_notes: The public API is currently available exclusively for Enterprise workspaces; users without this access are directed to contact an account manager.
blocker: The API is restricted to the Enterprise plan and requires an account manager for access if not available in the workspace.
auth_notes: API requests require Bearer token authentication via API keys managed within the Otter.ai account settings.

evidence.claim: Otter.ai’s Public API provides programmatic access to retrieve channels, conversations, transcripts, and workspace details, but is restricted to Enterprise workspaces.
Otter provides an official Model Context Protocol (MCP) server to allow AI assistants to securely access meeting context.
Search citation: New Otter.ai features plan to enable 'system of record'
Search citation: How Otter’s MCP Turned 76 Conversations into a Searchable Evidence-Based Study

api_notes: The API covers core objects including channels, conversations, transcripts, audio, and meeting insights.
